task.title: Repair persona tag import, Game model filtering, and preset switching
task.classification: catalog import safety, Game setup validation, and chat preset state consistency

coreClaim: Malformed persona tag values cannot crash the Personas panel, Game setup cannot submit an image-generation connection as a language model, and failed preset switches preserve the prior preset choices.

inScope: Persona JSON tag normalization and defensive catalog reads
Game setup GM and scene-effects connection eligibility
Sequenced preset assignment with compensation when choice clearing fails
Focused regression tests for all three bugs

claimBoundary.coreClaim: The three reproduced failures are rejected or recovered at their current feature owners without changing storage formats or runtime adapters.
legacyPathsOrFormats: Existing persona rows whose tags arrays contain non-string values
outOfScopeClaims: No claim that every malformed persona field is repaired.
No claim that storage writes across separate commands are globally atomic.
No new discoverable product workflow is introduced.

positiveRows.claim: Valid persona text tags survive normalization and remain sortable.
positiveRows.evidence: personas-panel-model.spec.ts and persona-editor-model.spec.ts pass with valid text tags surrounding malformed values.

positiveRows.claim: Language-model selectors retain text connections while the dedicated image selector retains image connections.
positiveRows.evidence: GameSetupWizard.spec.tsx passes the filtering and dependent image configuration cases.

positiveRows.claim: Successful preset assignment clears prior choices and retains existing choice-modal lookup behavior.
positiveRows.evidence: PresetsPanel uses the existing prompt-variable lookup only after both writes succeed.

contradictionRows.claim: Non-string persona tags must not reach localeCompare or toLowerCase consumers.
contradictionRows.evidence: The focused panel and editor model tests pass ["valid", 42, null, "also-valid"] through the shared normalizer.

contradictionRows.claim: An image-generation connection must not appear as a GM or scene-effects language option.
contradictionRows.evidence: The focused Game component test asserts both language selectors exclude image-connection.

contradictionRows.claim: A failed preset assignment must not clear existing choices, and a failed choice clear must restore the prior preset.
contradictionRows.evidence: Two PresetsPanel component tests cover assignment rejection and metadata rejection compensation.

legacyDefaultRows.claim: Existing well-formed persona tags, text connections, and successful preset changes retain their prior behavior.
legacyDefaultRows.evidence: The focused suites pass all nine existing and new tests, and the complete frontend suite passes 2,175 tests.

untestedRows: No manual desktop/Tauri click-through was run because the claims are deterministic component and model behavior without visual layout changes.

manualBlockers.reason: Focused component/model tests exercise the exact non-visual contracts.

verification.baselineEvidence: 430 test files and 2,175 tests passed; deterministic frontend/docs/workflow checks, cargo check, and the existing non-blocking knip report completed with exit code 0.
